# Master Commercial Clean — llms.txt

## Company Overview
Master Commercial Clean (MCC) is a professional commercial cleaning and janitorial services company headquartered in San Angelo, Texas 76901. Founded in October 2024, MCC serves businesses across West Texas with reliable, professional-grade cleaning services.

## Contact
- Phone: (325) 249-5191
- Website: https://www.mastercleanhq.com
- Location: San Angelo, Texas 76901
- Hours: Mon-Fri 7am-6pm, Sat-Sun 8am-2pm, After-hours by appointment

## Services Offered
1. **Commercial Cleaning** — Recurring janitorial support for offices, retail stores, banks, medical-adjacent spaces, and professional service firms. Includes nightly/weekly/custom schedules, restroom sanitation, floor care, trash removal, dusting, and touchpoint disinfection.
2. **Post-Construction Cleaning** — Turnover-ready cleanup for remodels, tenant improvements, and new commercial spaces. Includes fine dust removal, window/trim/fixture detailing, and floor cleanup.
3. **Specialized Cleaning** — Custom cleaning scopes for high-traffic, high-sensitivity environments including medical-adjacent facilities, warehouses, event spaces, and move-in/move-out transitions.

## Service Areas (50+ Cities)
### Concho Valley Region (Hub: San Angelo)
San Angelo, Ballinger, Brady, Coleman, Eldorado, Sonora, Junction, Mason, Wall, Christoval, Miles, Sterling City, Robert Lee, Bronte, Eden, Winters

### Big Country Region (Hub: Abilene)
Abilene, Sweetwater, Merkel, Clyde, Baird, Albany, Anson, Cisco, Eastland, Breckenridge, Colorado City, Stamford, Hamlin, Brownwood

### Permian Basin Region (Hubs: Midland, Odessa)
Midland, Odessa, Big Spring, Andrews, Crane, Kermit, Monahans, Pecos, Fort Stockton, McCamey, Stanton

### South Plains Region (Hub: Lubbock)
Lubbock, Wolfforth, Shallowater, Slaton, Levelland, Brownfield, Littlefield, Plainview, Post, Tahoka, Snyder, Seminole, Denver City, Idalou, Abernathy, Lamesa

## Website Structure
- / — Homepage
- /services — All services overview
- /commercial-cleaning — Commercial cleaning service detail
- /post-construction-cleaning — Post-construction cleanup detail
- /specialized-cleaning — Specialized cleaning detail
- /service-areas — All service areas index
- /service-areas/[city] — City-specific landing page (50+ pages)
- /service-areas/[city]/[service] — City + service combination page (150+ pages)
- /guides — Cost guide index
- /guides/[service]-cost — Service cost guide
- /guides/[service]-cost/[city] — City-specific cost guide
- /blog — Blog index with category filters
- /blog/[slug] — Individual blog articles (40+ articles)
- /about — Company overview
- /about/process — Our cleaning process
- /about/why-choose-us — Differentiators
- /reviews — Client reviews
- /faq — Comprehensive FAQ hub

## Key Differentiators
- Documented scopes of work for every engagement
- West Texas climate expertise (dust, heat, hard water, wind)
- 50+ city coverage across four regions
- 100% satisfaction guarantee
- Professional-grade equipment and products
- Flexible after-hours scheduling
- Free on-site walk-through estimates

## Industries Served
Corporate offices, retail stores, banks, medical-adjacent facilities, warehouses, churches, event spaces, property management, restaurants, professional service firms, educational facilities, government buildings
